top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE r.race = 'Vampire' 
AND s.alignment_id IN (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'Good')
AND s.id IN (
    SELECT hero_id 
    FROM hero_power hp
    JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
    WHERE sp.power_name LIKE '%super%' OR sp.power_name LIKE '%hero%'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE r.race = 'Vampire' AND sp.power_name = 'Superhero';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE r.race = 'Vampire' 
AND s.alignment_id IN (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'Good')
AND s.id IN (
    SELECT hero_id 
    FROM hero_power hp
    JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
    WHERE sp.power_name LIKE '%super%' OR sp.power_name LIKE '%hero%'
);
